title: hieracium tenericeps
intro: Hieracium tenericeps, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Hieracium tenericeps include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting digestive health and immune function. Herbal preparations of Hieracium tenericeps are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application.
